failures.description: The agent omitted item_id 5312063289 from the final answer even though the ProductCatalogSearch result showed it was an available bamboo skateboard costing $195.15, which is more than $194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. The correct items priced more than $194.56 are 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer from that tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289 despite its price being above the threshold. This is a failure to correctly interpret/use the relevant tool output, and it was not corrected later.
